scraped_bill_text.title: House Resolution with Non-Fiscal Recognition Language
scraped_bill_text.text: IN THE HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES, January 27, 2023. Mr. Smith (for himself, Ms. Jones, and Mr. Brown) submitted the following resolution; which was referred to the Committee on Education and the Workforce: RESOLUTION: Expressing support for National Mentoring Month. Whereas mentoring relationships play a critical role in the development of young people; Whereas quality mentoring programs help connect young people with opportunities for education, career, and personal growth; Now, therefore, be it Resolved, That the House of Representatives-- (1) recognizes the month of January 2023 as National Mentoring Month; and (2) encourages all Americans to recognize the value of mentoring.

rag_chunks.content: H. Res. 57 expresses support for National Mentoring Month. This is a non-binding resolution with no fiscal impact or appropriation authority.
